name: Pyramid
description: It’s not because you are stuck in a gigantic pyramid that you shouldn’t be looking for a way to make ends meet! Take control of a small Egyptian with overflowing greed and run at full speed to take possession of all the riches of the pyramid. Play alone against artificial intelligences or play against your friend in this exhilarating party game.
